subject: feat(pwa): add "Check for updates" to burger menu
body:
Users can now manually trigger an update check from the menu instead of
waiting for the 60-minute automatic interval. Shows a spinning icon and
"Checking..." text while the check is in progress.

Tags: pwa, ux, menu

Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
